diff: The documents herein outline recommended practices for establishing and maintaining backup infrastructure to help ensure that Multisig signers can continue to monitor, verify, and execute transactions if primary user interfaces, RPC providers, or block explorers become unavailable.

The documents herein outline recommended practices for establishing and maintaining backup infrastructure to help ensure that Multisig signers can continue to monitor, verify, and execute transactions if primary user interfaces, RPC providers, or block explorers become unavailable.
